scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed/001_district_and_framework.sql && wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed/002_pedagogy_library.sql && wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed/003_alexander_staff.sql
scripts.db:seed:prod: wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --file=./seed/001_district_and_framework.sql && wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --file=./seed/002_pedagogy_library.sql && wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --file=./seed/003_alexander_staff.sql
scripts.db:reset:local: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
